name: motion-dock
title: Dock
author: Motion Primitives
description: Magnifies application actions according to pointer proximity.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Added useReducedMotion handling that keeps the dock and item widths static and makes tooltip feedback immediate.
Changed the focusable role=button wrapper to a native button and require an accessible aria-label.
Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.

credits: Motion Primitives docs credit @kashyap20 and cite Build UI – Magnified Dock as inspiration.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import, disabled magnification for reduced motion, and replaced the simulated button with a labelled native button. Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper, keep the dock static when motion is reduced, and preserve native keyboard/touch activation and naming. Compile several upstream Motion 11-era components safely in the shared catalog while preserving their rendered behavior and install API.
